summary: A clip from a Fox Local segment with a CRIME WATCH label. It shows a uniformed police official speaking at a podium in front of a department seal reading Keeping the community safe, then a composite graphic with a booking photo of a man flanked by two photographs of young women. The lower-third reads a name and ARRESTED FOR ONE CRIME, BUT ACCUSED OF MANY OTHERS.

script.scene: A uniformed police official speaks at a podium in front of a department seal; FOX LOCAL label visible.
A composite graphic shows a booking photo of a man flanked by two photos of young women; lower-third reads ARRESTED FOR ONE CRIME, BUT ACCUSED OF MANY OTHERS.
A single portrait of a young woman fills the frame; the lower-third continues.

notable_text: FOX LOCAL; CRIME WATCH; ARRESTED FOR ONE CRIME, BUT ACCUSED OF MANY OTHERS
